g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Triage API endpoint do?')
sendPrompt('How does feature extraction work in detail?')
sendPrompt('How does the severity classifier model work?')
sendPrompt('How does the priority predictor model work?')
sendPrompt('How does the queue router model work?')
sendPrompt('What output does the severity model produce?')
sendPrompt('What output does the priority model produce?')
sendPrompt('What output does the queue router produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the confidence gate logic work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a ticket is auto-assigned?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a ticket is flagged for review?')
sendPrompt('What does the response payload contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the response get written back to ITSM?')
g.text: ITSM platform — fields populated, SLA timer starts
